# Obligatory Mermaid Architecture Documentation Guideline

## Minimum required diagrams
- High-level system context diagram
- Component/module interaction diagram
- Runtime flow diagram for key user/service paths

## Rules
- Keep diagram nodes aligned with real package/module/service names in code.
- Update Mermaid diagrams whenever architecture-relevant code changes.

## Recommended Mermaid types
- `flowchart` for process/request flows
- `sequenceDiagram` for interactions over time
- `classDiagram` for domain model structure
- `graph TD` or `graph LR` for dependency overviews
